title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Booking Confirmation Screen – All required fields displayed
description: AC 03.1 — Equivalence Partitioning: Verify the Booking Confirmation Screen shows all required fields: lesson name, date+time, location+classroom, teacher, and optional remarks field.
preconditions: Student user has active LA. A bookable lesson (Published, available) exists at student's LA location.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons and tap "Reserve" on an available lesson"
2. "View all fields on the screen"
3. "View the remarks section"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
2. "Lesson Name, Date+Time, Location, Classroom, Teacher are all displayed"
3. "Optional remarks input field is displayed"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Book Lesson – Happy path – Student Session created
description: AC 03.2 — BR-12: CRUD Testing: Full booking flow creates a Student Session record with Booking_Flag=TRUE for the correct student and lesson.
preconditions: Student user has 1 active LA for Location A. A Published, bookable lesson at Location A has available capacity and is within booking deadline.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons and tap "Reserve" on the available lesson"
2. "Review details and tap "Confirm""
3. "View the Booking Success Screen"
4. "Open Booking List"
5. "Verify in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
2. "Booking submitted"
3. "Booking success screen is shown with lesson details and action buttons"
4. "Lesson appears in the student's Booking List with Booking_Flag=TRUE"
5. "A Student Session record exists for (student, lesson) with Booking_Flag=TRUE"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Book Lesson – Draft lesson auto-published silently on booking
description: AC 03.2 — BR-13/BR-30: State Transition: When a student books a Draft lesson, the lesson status must be automatically set to Published. This auto-publish must NOT trigger any push notification to other students assigned to the lesson.
preconditions: Student A and Student B are both assigned to a Draft lesson at Location A (Bookable_Flag=TRUE, available capacity, within booking deadline). Student A will perform the booking.
steps_result:
1. "Confirm lesson status = Draft in Salesforce and Student B is assigned"
2. "Student A opens Browse Lessons, taps ''Reserve'' on the Draft lesson, then taps ''Confirm''"
3. "Verify lesson status in Salesforce after booking"
4. "Check Student B's device for push notifications"
5. "Verify no publish notification event logged in system"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson status = Draft; Student B assignment confirmed"
2. "Booking Success Screen shown"
3. "Lesson status = Published (auto-published)"
4. "No push notification received by Student B"
5. "No notification event created for the auto-publish transition"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Book Lesson – Remarks saved with "Booking Note: " prefix
description: AC 03.2 — BR-14: Equivalence Partitioning: When student enters remarks, the value is saved to Attendance_Response_Remark with "Booking Note: " prefix.
preconditions: Student user has active LA. A bookable Published lesson exists with available capacity within deadline.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons, tap "Reserve" on an available lesson"
2. "Enter text in the remarks field"
3. "Tap "Confirm""
4. "Verify Attendance_Response_Remark in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
2. "Text entered successfully"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown"
4. "Field value = ""Booking Note: Please arrange front row seat"""

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Book Lesson – Booking without remarks – No prefix added
description: AC 03.2 — BR-14: Equivalence Partitioning: When student leaves remarks empty, Attendance_Response_Remark is not created with any prefix.
preconditions: Student user has active LA. A bookable Published lesson exists with available capacity within deadline.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons, tap "Reserve" on an available lesson"
2. "Leave the remarks field empty"
3. "Tap "Confirm""
4. "Verify Attendance_Response_Remark in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
2. "Remarks field is blank"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown"
4. "Field is empty or null; no ""Booking Note: "" entry created"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – LA Selection – One active LA – That LA used for booking
description: AC 03.2 — BR-15: Decision Table: When student has exactly one active LA, it is selected for the booking automatically.
preconditions: Student user has exactly 1 active LA (LA-A). A bookable lesson at LA-A's location is available.
steps_result:
1. "Book a lesson via app (tap Reserve → Confirm)"
2. "Verify Student Session in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "Session is linked to LA-A; points deducted from LA-A"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – LA Selection – Location-matching LA prioritized over non-matching
description: AC 03.2 — BR-15: Decision Table (Priority Level 2): When student has 2 active LAs and only one's location matches the lesson location, the location-matching LA is selected.
preconditions:
Student user has 2 active LAs:
- LA-A: location = Location A, active during lesson date
- LA-B: location = Location B, active during lesson date
Lesson is at Location A.
steps_result:
1. "Book the lesson at Location A via app"
2. "Verify Student Session in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "Session is linked to LA-A (location match); LA-B is not used"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – LA Selection – Earliest start date LA selected when locations both match
description: AC 03.2 — BR-15: Decision Table (Priority Level 3): When student has 2 active LAs both with matching location, the LA with the earlier start date is selected.
preconditions:
Student user has 2 active LAs at Location A:
- LA-A: start date = 2026-01-01
- LA-B: start date = 2026-03-01
Lesson is at Location A. Both LAs are active during lesson date.
steps_result:
1. "Book the lesson at Location A via app"
2. "Verify Student Session in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "Session is linked to LA-A (earlier start date 2026-01-01)"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – LA Selection – Earliest created LA selected as final tiebreaker
description: AC 03.2 — BR-15: Decision Table (Priority Level 4): When 2 LAs are equal in location and start date, the LA created earlier is selected.
preconditions:
Student user has 2 active LAs at Location A with the same start date:
- LA-A: created_at = 2026-01-01 09:00
- LA-B: created_at = 2026-01-01 14:00
steps_result:
1. "Book a lesson at Location A via app"
2. "Verify Student Session in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown"
2. "Session is linked to LA-A (created earlier)"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Validation – Duplicate booking blocked
description: AC 03.3 — BR-16: Negative Testing: Attempting to book a lesson the student is already allocated to must be rejected with the correct error message.
preconditions: Student user has already booked (or been allocated to) the target lesson. Student attempts to book the same lesson again.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons"
2. "Attempt to submit a second booking for the same lesson (e.g., via rapid double-tap or API replay)"
3. "View error message"
4. "Verify Student Session count in Salesforce"
steps_data:
1. "The already-booked lesson is visible (Cancel button shown)"
2. "Booking rejected"
3. "Error shown: ""You have already reserved this lesson."""
4. "Only 1 Student Session exists for (student, lesson)"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Validation – Lesson full – Booking blocked
description: AC 03.3 — BR-17: BVA: Booking must be rejected when the lesson has reached maximum capacity at submission time.
preconditions: A bookable lesson with capacity=1. Another student has already booked it (session count = 1 = capacity).
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons"
2. "Attempt to book the lesson (e.g., race condition or UI bypass)"
3. "View error message"
4. "Verify no new Student Session created"
steps_data:
1. "Lesson card visible (may show as full)"
2. "Booking rejected at submission"
3. "Error shown: ""This lesson is now full. Please choose another lesson."""
4. "Session count in SF remains at capacity"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Validation – Past booking deadline – Booking blocked
description: AC 03.3 — BR-18: BVA: Booking must be rejected when submitted after the booking deadline has passed.
preconditions: Current time is past (lesson start − booking deadline hours). Student attempts to submit booking.
steps_result:
1. "Attempt to submit a booking for a lesson past its booking deadline"
2. "View error message"
steps_data:
1. "Booking rejected"
2. "Error shown: ""The booking deadline has passed for this lesson."""

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Validation – No active LA – Booking blocked
description: AC 03.3 — BR-19: Negative Testing: Booking must be rejected when student has no active Lesson Allocation at submission time.
preconditions: Student's LA has expired between Browse and Confirmation step (or LA deleted mid-flow).
steps_result:
1. "Begin booking flow (Confirmation Screen already open)"
2. "Invalidate student's LA (expire or delete) then tap "Confirm""
3. "View error message"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen shown"
2. "Booking rejected"
3. "Error shown: ""You are not eligible to reserve lessons at this time."""

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Validation – Insufficient points – Booking blocked
description: AC 03.3 — BR-20/BR-31: Negative Testing: Booking must be rejected when the student's remaining LA points are less than the lesson point cost.
preconditions: Student user has active LA with 0 remaining points. Lesson point cost > 0.
steps_result:
1. "Open Browse Lessons and tap "Reserve" on a lesson that costs points"
2. "Tap "Confirm""
3. "View error message"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
2. "Booking rejected"
3. "Error shown: ""Remaining points are insufficient to book this lesson."""

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Post-Booking – Booking Success Screen shown
description: AC 03.4 — BR-21: CRUD Testing: After a successful booking, the app navigates to a Booking Success Screen showing lesson details.
preconditions: Student user has active LA. A bookable Published lesson exists with capacity and within deadline.
steps_result:
1. "Book an available lesson via app (tap Reserve → Confirm)"
2. "View the success screen content"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen is shown"
2. "Lesson name, date+time, location, teacher are displayed on the success screen"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Post-Booking – Lesson appears in Booking List
description: AC 03.4 — BR-1: CRUD Testing: After a successful booking, the lesson appears in the student's Booking List.
preconditions: Student user has active LA. Booking List is initially empty.
steps_result:
1. "Confirm Booking List is empty before booking"
2. "Book an available lesson via app"
3. "Navigate to Booking List"
steps_data:
1. "Booking List shows empty state"
2. "Booking Success Screen shown"
3. "The newly booked lesson appears in Booking List with Booking_Flag=TRUE"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Booking Deadline – Device timezone ahead of lesson timezone – Deadline uses lesson timezone
description: AC 03.3 — BR-26: BVA (Timezone): When the student's device timezone is AHEAD of the lesson's timezone, the booking deadline must still be evaluated in the LESSON timezone. If within deadline in lesson timezone, booking must be allowed.
preconditions:
Lesson timezone = UTC+9 (JST). Student's device timezone = UTC+11 (AEST).
Lesson start = today at 10:00 JST. Booking deadline = 2 hours before start = 08:00 JST.
Current time = 07:30 JST (within deadline) = 09:30 AEST.
steps_result:
1. "Confirm current JST time = 07:30 (within 08:00 JST deadline)"
2. "Open Browse Lessons and tap "Reserve" on the lesson"
3. "Tap "Confirm""
4. "View result"
steps_data:
1. "Within booking deadline in lesson timezone"
2. "Booking Confirmation Screen opens"
3. "Booking succeeds"
4. "Booking Success Screen shown; Student Session created"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Booking Deadline – Device timezone behind lesson timezone – Deadline uses lesson timezone
description: AC 03.3 — BR-26: BVA (Timezone): When the student's device timezone is BEHIND the lesson's timezone, booking must be REJECTED if the deadline has passed in lesson timezone, even if the device clock shows the deadline has not yet passed.
preconditions:
Lesson timezone = UTC+9 (JST). Student's device timezone = UTC+7 (ICT).
Lesson start = today at 10:00 JST. Booking deadline = 08:00 JST.
Current time = 08:30 JST (past deadline) = 06:30 ICT.
steps_result:
1. "Confirm current JST time = 08:30 (past 08:00 JST deadline), device shows 06:30 ICT"
2. "Attempt to submit booking (tap Reserve → Confirm)"
3. "View error message"
steps_data:
1. "Past booking deadline in lesson timezone despite device showing otherwise"
2. "Booking rejected"
3. "Error shown: ""The booking deadline has passed for this lesson."""
column28: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Multi-Account – Two students same device – Different lessons – Each session isolated
column29: AC 03.2 — BR-12: Session Isolation: When two students use the same device sequentially, each booking must create a Student Session for the correct student only. Switching accounts must not contaminate session ownership.
column30: Student 1 and Student 2 have separate accounts on the same device. Both have active LAs. Lesson 1 is at Student 1's LA location (bookable, capacity ≥ 2). Lesson 2 is at Student 2's LA location (bookable, capacity ≥ 2).
column43:
1. "Login as Student 1 → Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm"
2. "Switch account to Student 2 on the same device"
3. "Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 2 → Confirm"
4. "Verify in Salesforce: Student Session for (Student 1, Lesson 1)"
5. "Verify in Salesforce: Student Session for (Student 2, Lesson 2)"
6. "Verify no cross-contaminated sessions exist"
column44:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown for Student 1"
2. "Student 2 home screen shown"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown for Student 2"
4. "Session exists; Booking_Flag=TRUE; student = Student 1"
5. "Session exists; Booking_Flag=TRUE; student = Student 2"
6. "No session for (Student 1, Lesson 2) and no session for (Student 2, Lesson 1)"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Multi-Account – Two students same device – Same lesson – Two separate sessions created
description: AC 03.2 — BR-12: Session Isolation: When two students use the same device and both book the same lesson, two independent Student Sessions must be created, each linked to the correct student.
preconditions: Student 1 and Student 2 have separate accounts on the same device. Both have active LAs for the same location. Lesson 1 is bookable with capacity ≥ 2.
steps_result:
1. "Login as Student 1 → Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm"
2. "Switch account to Student 2 on the same device"
3. "Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm"
4. "Verify in Salesforce: 2 Student Sessions exist for Lesson 1"
5. "Verify session ownership"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown for Student 1"
2. "Student 2 home screen shown"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown for Student 2"
4. "Two separate sessions: one for Student 1, one for Student 2, each with Booking_Flag=TRUE"
5. "Each session's student field matches the respective student; no session is shared or duplicated"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Multi-Account – Student books lesson – Switches to Parent – Parent has no booking access
description: AC 06.1 — BR-29: Session Isolation: After a student books a lesson and switches to a parent account on the same device, the parent must NOT have access to any booking features. The student's session must remain unaffected.
preconditions: Student and Parent accounts are both accessible on the same device. Student has active LA. Lesson 1 is bookable (capacity ≥ 1).
steps_result:
1. "Login as Student → Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm"
2. "Switch account to Parent on the same device"
3. "Navigate to Lesson Booking menu area"
4. "Verify in Salesforce: Student Session for (Student, Lesson 1)"
steps_data:
1. "Booking Success Screen shown; Student Session created"
2. "Parent home screen shown"
3. "Lesson Booking menu is NOT visible for Parent"
4. "Session still exists; Booking_Flag=TRUE; student = Student"

title: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Multi-Account – Parent logged in then switches to Student – Student books lesson correctly
description: AC 06.1 — BR-29: Session Isolation: When a parent is first logged in (with no booking access), then the account is switched to a student on the same device, the student must be able to book normally and the session must be attributed to the student, not the parent.
preconditions: Parent and Student accounts are both accessible on the same device. Student has active LA. Lesson 2 is bookable (capacity ≥ 1).
steps_result:
1. "Login as Parent → navigate to home screen"
2. "Switch account to Student on the same device"
3. "Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 2 → Confirm"
4. "Verify in Salesforce: Student Session for (Student, Lesson 2)"
5. "Verify no Student Session created for Parent account"
steps_data:
1. "Parent home screen shown; Lesson Booking menu NOT visible"
2. "Student home screen shown"
3. "Booking Success Screen shown"
4. "Session exists; Booking_Flag=TRUE; student = Student (not Parent)"
5. "No session linked to Parent for any lesson"
column27: [Nichibei] Lesson Booking – Manual Assignment – Staff assigns student via SF first – Student books same lesson via app – Duplicate blocked
column28: AC 03.3 — BR-16 / Lesson-Learned Risk #1: When staff has already manually assigned a student to a lesson via Salesforce (Booking_Flag=FALSE), and the student tries to book the same lesson via app, the duplicate allocation must be blocked.
column29:
1. Confirm Student Session (Student A, Lesson 1) exists in SF with Booking_Flag=FALSE
2. Login as Student A → open Browse Lessons
3. Tap Reserve on Lesson 1 → tap Confirm
4. Verify in Salesforce
column30:
1. "Session exists; manual assignment confirmed"
2. "Lesson 1 is visible in browse list"
3. "App returns error: duplicate allocation"
4. "No second Student Session created for (Student A, Lesson 1)"

title: AC 03.3 — BR-16 / Lesson-Learned Risk #1 (Concurrency): Race condition test. Student submits booking via app at the same moment staff creates a Student Session in SF. Only one session must be committed; no duplicate.
description:
1. Student A taps Reserve on Lesson 1 → taps Confirm in app
2. Simultaneously, staff creates Student Session for (Student A, Lesson 1) in Salesforce
3. Verify in Salesforce: count of Student Sessions for (Student A, Lesson 1)
4. Verify whichever path succeeded (app or staff)
preconditions:
1. "Booking request submitted"
2. "Concurrent write attempted"
3. "Exactly 1 Student Session exists; no duplicate created"
4. "Either app returns Booking Success OR staff save succeeds — not both; the other returns an error"

title: AC 03.2 — BR-31: Points calculation for a self-booked session must be equivalent to manual staff assignment logic. No special override or bypass.
description:
1. Record Student A's point balance before booking
2. Login as Student A → Browse Lessons → Reserve Lesson 1 → Confirm
3. Check point balance after booking in Salesforce
4. Compare with equivalent staff-manual assignment point deduction for same lesson type
preconditions:
1. "Balance = 10 points"
2. "Booking Success Screen shown"
3. "Balance = 9 points (deducted 1 point)"
4. "Deduction amount is identical to manual assignment path"
postconditions:
1. "Student A; initial balance = 10"
2. "Student A; Lesson 1"
3. "Expected deduction = 1 point"
4. ""
